title: Pero Grilled Pato with Arroz con Falafel
description: A twist on traditional Peruvian dish, featuring grilled pato with crunchy arroz con falafel.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add diced pato and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add cumin and chili powder, stir to combine.
Add cooked arroz con to the skillet and stir to combine with pato mixture.
Meanwhile, grill falafel over medium heat until crispy and golden brown.
Serve arroz con pato mixture in a bowl, topped with grilled falafel and chopped cilantro.
Drizzle with remaining 1 tbsp of olive oil and season with salt and pepper to taste.
